text:
Rajya Sabha Chairman Jagdeep Dhankhar rejected Mohammed Nadimul Haque's notice to discuss wrestler Vinesh Phogat's disqualification at the Paris Olympics, as it did not meet submission guidelines. Dhankhar mentioned he had attempted to communicate with Haque. The notice, submitted post-deadline, did not adhere to Rule 267's requirements for urgent matters.
